why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:bundle_delimiter must dispatch from the official framed packet id to an empty-body bundle_delimiter decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from bundle grouping behavior, Play state transition handling, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The Rust oracle test play_bundle_delimiter_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer did not compile because Stevenarella had no Packet::BundleDelimiterClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound bundle_delimiter surface. After adding the packet variant, the protocol crate required mapped_packet.rs to stay exhaustive for the new Packet variant. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 mapping has no Play packet table.

play_clientbound_bundle_delimiter.official_fixture: registered delimiter singleton decoded from the official Play clientbound packet id and re-encoded by the official GameProtocols clientbound codec
play_clientbound_bundle_delimiter.official_body_shape: empty body after VarInt packet id

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.decorator(RegistryAccess.EMPTY)).codec().decode/encode(...), and ClientboundBundleDelimiterPacket.type().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound bundle_delimiter dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 mapping has Handshaking, Login, and Configuration mappings, but no Play clientbound mapping for official packet id 0x00.
Adding any new packet variant requires an exhaustive Packet::map arm and mapped packet type.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `BundleDelimiterClientbound` found for enum `Packet`; after adding the variant, error[E0004] reported mapped_packet.rs missing Packet::BundleDelimiterClientbound(_) exhaustiveness
